name: Urban Strife
short_description: Old school TBS, post-apoc survival and RPG. Recruit deranged locals in your militia, ally local factions and fight those you hate. Haul loot back and rebuild your shelter, doctor your wounds, and fix your guns. People need feeding, booze needs brewing and there is an end of the world to enjoy.
reasons: 成長/積み上げ要素: Loot +18
成長/積み上げ要素: RPG +10
現在プレイヤー500人以上 +10

name: Garisani Detective Agency
short_description: Garisani Detective Agency is a story-driven real-time co-op deduction game for two.In 1990s Korea, play as a brother and his ghost sister, taking cases from the living and the dead. Gather clues from two angles and solve puzzles together.An analog era of pagers and payphones.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー100人以上 +8

name: Zigdig
short_description: Fight nonstop in this fast-paced auto shooter where upgrades happen in real time. Find the relic. Gather resources. Extract before time runs out. Risk staying longer for greater rewards.

name: Halu - The Fish
short_description: A first-person psychological horror game about a strict home, a child’s daily routines, and something beneath the surface that grows more disturbing the deeper you go.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー10人以上 +5

name: Vellar
short_description: Vellar is a first-person psychological horror game where a family is dead… but the recordings they left behind slowly reveal a version of events that doesn’t match reality. Explore a shifting house filled with impossible rooms, distorted corridors, and uncover a truth that refuses to stay buried.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー10人以上 +5

name: diffiCULT
short_description: Step into a fully 3D medieval world of deception. diffiCULT is a multiplayer social deduction game where you must uncover hidden cultists. Use proximity voice chat, investigate houses at night, survive daily votes, and reveal who is truly on your side.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Hentai Puzzle: Cathy
short_description: Solve seductive anime puzzles with Cathy, a naughty furry cosplayer. Complete challenges, unlock images and scenes, and enjoy playful adult progression in Hentai Puzzle: Cathy.
reasons: 成長/積み上げ要素: Progression +20

name: The Incident at Galley House
short_description: In 1936, something terrible happened at Galley House. Decades later, with a strange contraption that reveals echoes of the past, you must uncover the truth behind this grisly mystery.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー500人以上 +10

name: Cat Chess
short_description: Play the ancient and thrilling game of Chess but with... cats! Lead your furry friends to the Purrfect battle of brains and whiskers!
reasons: 現在プレイヤー100人以上 +8

name: Something to Drink?
short_description: I'm Tom and I just got a job as a bartender. Now I have to wipe down the same sticky counters where I used to leave my own marks. In this dive, even the rats look like they're hungover. Alright, the boozers won't pour their own drinks - time to get back to work.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー10人以上 +5

name: D-topia
short_description: Step into the world of D-topia in this gentle-paced puzzle adventure. In D-topia, life is curated by artificial intelligence to maximize happiness. As the newest Facilitator, it’s up to you to solve puzzles to keep the D-topia residents happy and the facility running.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー10人以上 +5

name: TowerLine
short_description: Build production lines to extract resources, craft parts, and assemble towers. Complete orders, earn rewards, unlock new machines, and grow your factory.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー10人以上 +5

name: The Crimson Maid
short_description: A marriage between first person exploration and visual novel, blessed with a sprinkle of puzzle gameplay. Immerse yourself in a period drama that intertwines romance with murder mystery, as a young cleric who must resist or give in to the charms of a strikingly beautiful maid.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー10人以上 +5

name: Guardian of the Sacred Seal
short_description: "Guardian of the Sacred Seal" is a story-driven adventure game centered on the concept: “To be unconditionally loved by a yandere young man.” In the otherworldly paradise of Gokurakudō, a young girl partners with a mysterious man to handle seemingly ordinary requests that hide deeper secrets.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Material Maker
short_description: Create procedural materials and texture 3D models with node-based graphs. Export to Godot, Unity, and Unreal Engine, and access a website with hundreds of community-made materials. Runs on Windows, Linux, and macOS.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Rock Bottom
short_description: Mine. Smelt. Upgrade. Repeat. Rock Bottom is an incremental mining game where every swing makes you stronger. Descend through 8 unique layers, unlock devastating abilities, and discover what lies at Rock Bottom
reasons: 現在プレイヤー500人以上 +10

name: Forza Horizon 6 Italian Passion Car Pack
short_description: Embrace your passion for 4 great new Italian cars in Forza Horizon 6, perfect for cruising, racing, or exploring (available as released).

name: Inga Chronicle
short_description: A deckbuilding roguelike where real history makes the strongest combos. 200+ cards, 100+ Causal Combos rooted in authentic Japanese history — from Asuka to Bakumatsu. The more you know, the stronger you get.
reasons: 成長/積み上げ要素: Roguelike +10
現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Aspectless One
short_description: An isometric action RPG set in a dark fantasy world. Collect the shattered Aspects of Omnia, master your skills, and face enemies that will test your limits. This is just the beginning.
reasons: 成長/積み上げ要素: RPG +10

name: ChronoRewind: The Great Ritual
short_description: A strategic idle game where you, the Archmage-General, must channel mana into the Great Ritual, while fierce enemies assault the Kingdom. Will you balance defense, magical development, mage recruitment and ritual channeling well enough to save the Kingdom or will you lead it to its doom?
reasons: 現在プレイヤー10人以上 +5

name: Y2K Coin Pusher
short_description: Enjoy this 2000's inspired coin pusher game with 13 unlockable levels, each corresponding to their own song and vibe, all in delicious PS2 inspired graphics.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Pengo Friendo
short_description: Pengo Friendo is a cozy productivity companion where a robot penguin helps you stay focused, build discipline, and reach your goals through gentle nudges, habit tracking, and rewarding moments of concentration.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Cat Chess - Royal Cat (Deluxe Digital Edition)
short_description: Become the best crazy cat lady with this deluxe edition! 2 new Cat Chess sets, boards, music packs and more!

name: Train Sim World® 6: Cargo Line Vol. 6 - Gas
short_description: Discover different freight traffic with Skyhook Games’ Cargo Line for Train Sim World. In Vol. 6, hop to Mannheim - Kaiserslautern for the first German pack! Don’t let the pressure get to you as you turn up the heat with Zags Gas Tankers in-tow.

name: Strategic Command: World War I - Battles for Ypres
short_description: Relive the intense struggle for Ypres in six fast-paced campaigns spanning 1914–1918. Command Allied or German forces, adapt to evolving WWI tactics and decide the fate of Flanders in these divisional-level battles.

name: Railway Routes
short_description: Guide trains, build tracks, and solve relaxing grid-based railway puzzles. Plan the perfect route across 100+ handcrafted levels and watch your railway come to life.

name: Figryne Cast Studio Engine
short_description: An all-in-one VTuber streaming studio that tracks your VRM avatar in real time and takes you live. Its 3D-native engine brings cinematic post-FX and Axis 3D depth, and you can stream straight to YouTube, Twitch, and any RTMP-compatible service. No OBS needed.

name: 蝶々反乱
short_description: Butterfly Rebellion Launch butterfly horns to reclaim nature and raise your Greening Rate! Restore as much territory as possible within 180 seconds while fighting back against environmental destruction.

name: BIOTONE.
short_description: A pitch-controlled brick breaker where you move the paddle with your voice. Travel through 8 biomes brought to life with retro-inspired sound and visuals.

name: Mandat
short_description: Interactive political fiction strategy game: govern a country in crisis through Yes or No choices; developed largely with AI assistance. Press, elections, multiple endings.
